title: Polished Geek is hiring again!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re hiring again at Polished Geek! Those of you here who are experts in monday․com, if you are looking for a super exciting role working as a Business Process Automation Consultant & Implementer with a small but mighty team of certified consultants at Polished Geek, let’s chat. Reach out to me directly at deb@polishedgeek.com.

There’s a lot to the role but here I’ll boil it down to the must haves:

  1. Solid understanding of business process management & process optimization
  2. Experience with building out monday․com workflows
  3. Experience training clients at all levels of tech-savvy on how to use business software

Bonus skills & experience:

  1. Make/Integromat
  2. Zapier
  3. System integration background

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek
